# Veteran News

> The trusted daily intelligence briefing for U.S. veterans, service members, and their families. Curated from 14+ credible journalists, advocates, and government sources covering those who served. Published by Warriors Fund.

## What this site is

Veteran News (https://veteransnews.org) is a free, ad-free, editorially-independent news aggregator focused on U.S. veterans. The site is published by Warriors Fund, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit supporting warriors and their families.

Coverage areas: VA benefits, healthcare, transition, advocacy, policy, family, legacy, community, service, and branch-specific news.

## Pages

- [/](https://veteransnews.org/) — Today's briefing (lead story + numbered briefing list + events + feed)
- [/news](https://veteransnews.org/news) — Full searchable news feed with category filters
- [/news/{slug}](https://veteransnews.org/news/) — Individual story pages with related articles, share, and source attribution
- [/events](https://veteransnews.org/events) — Veteran events calendar (virtual and in-person)
- [/resources](https://veteransnews.org/resources) — Vetted directory: VA programs, hotlines, VSOs, jobs, housing, healthcare
- [/topics](https://veteransnews.org/topics) — All topics index
- [/branches](https://veteransnews.org/branches) — Service branch hub

### Section pages
- [/benefits](https://veteransnews.org/benefits) — Disability claims, GI Bill, pension, home loans
- [/health](https://veteransnews.org/health) — Mental health, PTSD, MST, women's health, toxic exposure
- [/service](https://veteransnews.org/service) — Active-duty matters that affect veterans
- [/transition](https://veteransnews.org/transition) — Out-processing, careers, education
- [/advocacy](https://veteransnews.org/advocacy) — Capitol Hill, VSO advocacy, policy
- [/legacy](https://veteransnews.org/legacy) — Military culture, history, memorialization
- [/community](https://veteransnews.org/community) — Veterans helping veterans
- [/family](https://veteransnews.org/family) — Spouses, kids, caregivers, survivors

### Branch pages
- [/branch/army](https://veteransnews.org/branch/army)
- [/branch/navy](https://veteransnews.org/branch/navy)
- [/branch/air-force](https://veteransnews.org/branch/air-force)
- [/branch/marines](https://veteransnews.org/branch/marines)
- [/branch/coast-guard](https://veteransnews.org/branch/coast-guard)
- [/branch/space-force](https://veteransnews.org/branch/space-force)

### Tools & utilities
- [/tools](https://veteransnews.org/tools) — VA disability, GI Bill BAH, and CRDP calculators
- [/newsletter](https://veteransnews.org/newsletter) — Email subscriptions (daily, weekly, benefits, breaking)
- [/saved](https://veteransnews.org/saved) — Local bookmarks
- [/about](https://veteransnews.org/about) — Mission, editorial standards, Warriors Fund context
- [/donate](https://veteransnews.org/donate) — Support the mission

### Editorial / legal
- [/editorial-standards](https://veteransnews.org/editorial-standards)
- [/corrections](https://veteransnews.org/corrections)
- [/press](https://veteransnews.org/press)
- [/contact](https://veteransnews.org/contact)
- [/privacy](https://veteransnews.org/privacy)
- [/terms](https://veteransnews.org/terms)

## Public APIs

All endpoints return JSON. CORS enabled. No authentication required.

- [/api/intelligence](https://veteransnews.org/api/intelligence) — Articles + briefing + events. Supports `?limit`, `?offset`, `?category`, `?q`, `?fields=list`
- [/api/articles](https://veteransnews.org/api/articles) — Alias
- [/api/search?q=](https://veteransnews.org/api/search) — Keyword search
- [/api/events](https://veteransnews.org/api/events) — Events feed
- [/api/events/upcoming](https://veteransnews.org/api/events/upcoming) — Top 10 upcoming
- [/api/sources](https://veteransnews.org/api/sources) — Source directory + counts
- [/api/health](https://veteransnews.org/api/health) — Liveness check
- [/api/newsletter](https://veteransnews.org/api/newsletter) (POST `{email, list}`) — Subscribe

## Discovery / SEO

- [/sitemap.xml](https://veteransnews.org/sitemap.xml) — Sitemap index
- [/sitemap-pages.xml](https://veteransnews.org/sitemap-pages.xml) — Static pages
- [/sitemap-articles.xml](https://veteransnews.org/sitemap-articles.xml) — All articles
- [/sitemap-news.xml](https://veteransnews.org/sitemap-news.xml) — Google News (last 48hr)
- [/rss.xml](https://veteransnews.org/rss.xml) — RSS feed
- [/llms.txt](https://veteransnews.org/llms.txt) — This file

## Categories

benefits · health · service · transition · legacy · community · advocacy · family

## Crisis support

Highest-priority resource on every page: tel:988 (press 1) or text 838255.

## Editorial principles

Sources are always named. Original articles are linked. No paywalls. No ads. Independence funded by Warriors Fund and reader donations. See /editorial-standards.
